# Ecqqo

> WhatsApp-native executive assistant for high-net-worth operators, founders, and family-office teams.

Ecqqo automates executive assistant workflows directly inside WhatsApp. No extra apps, no handoffs, no follow-up leaks.

## What Ecqqo Does

- Scheduling: "Book a meeting with Ahmad tomorrow at 3pm" — Ecqqo checks calendars, proposes slots, sends invites.
- Calendar management: Morning briefings, conflict detection, timezone handling.
- Email digests: Summarizes unread emails, drafts replies, flags urgent items.
- Reminders: Smart follow-ups, deadline tracking, recurring tasks.
- Travel coordination: Flight lookups, hotel bookings, itinerary assembly.
- Daily briefs: Consolidated morning summary of calendar, email, and tasks.

## How It Works

1. Capture: You send a natural-language message via WhatsApp.
2. Propose: Ecqqo interprets intent, checks integrations, and proposes a structured action plan.
3. Execute: Upon approval, Ecqqo executes — books meetings, sends emails, sets reminders.

## Pricing

- Founder plan: $199/mo (749 AED/mo)
- Dreamer plan: $399/mo (1,499 AED/mo)
- Custom/Enterprise: Contact for pricing
- 30% discount on annual billing
